mutations.operation: replace the registered non-equivalence of FARA and LTS-PROV with one equivalence class
mutations.required_detection: reject because no bidirectional commitment-preserving translation witness is supplied

mutations.operation: remove a charged decoder, adapter, invariant, or provenance helper from a candidate cost ledger while retaining its behavior
mutations.required_detection: reject because representation machinery cannot be treated as free
reject because the registered transformation family is finite and non-exhaustive
reject because ablation was local to frozen vocabularies and reconstructions

mutations.operation: replace multiple_incomparable_minima with unique_minimum_FARA or unique_minimum_LTS_PROV
mutations.required_detection: reject because neither successful minimum dominates or translates to the other

mutations.operation: remove one scope-limiting or negative-control fixture before aggregation
mutations.required_detection: reject because all registered counterexamples participate in the weakest-gate result
reject because internal isolated implementations do not satisfy separate-human-or-organization control

execution_rules: each mutation is applied separately to an otherwise valid frozen input
the independent pipeline must identify the protected gate or an equally specific failure
a generic parse failure is insufficient when the mutation remains schema-valid
mutation order may not affect results
all mutation outputs and diagnostics are retained
nonclaims: passing the corpus proves the implementation correct
passing the corpus proves conceptual validity
